# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  appName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string

variables:
  sqlDatabaseName: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), 'Db')]"
  appServicePlanName: "[concat(parameters('appName'), 'AppServicePlan')]"

resources:
- type: "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms"
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[variables('appServicePlanName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    name: "[variables('appServicePlanName')]"
    sku:
      name: "S1"
      tier: "Standard"
      capacity: "1"

- type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[parameters('appName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
  properties:
    serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"

- type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    administratorLogin: "sqlAdmin"
    administratorLoginPassword: "[concat('P@ssword123', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  
- type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases"
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[variables('sqlDatabaseName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
  properties:
    edition: "Basic"

- type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  sku:
    name: "Standard_LRS"
  kind: "StorageV2"

outputs:
  webAppUri:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('https://', parameters('appName'), '.azurewebsites.net')]"
  sqlDatabaseId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
  storageAccountId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
